name: mac-riff
description: Zero-latency USB-to-Keyboard bridge for PDP Riffmaster guitar dongle on macOS

scripts.build: clang -O3 -target arm64-apple-macos11 -framework ApplicationServices injector.c -o injector.arm64 && clang -O3 -target x86_64-apple-macos11 -framework ApplicationServices injector.c -o injector.x86_64 && lipo -create injector.arm64 injector.x86_64 -output injector && rm injector.arm64 injector.x86_64
